task_completion.description: Generate a new random keyfile named 'omega_v2.key' in '/home/ga/Keyfiles/'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Keyfile Generator window showing the path '/home/ga/Keyfiles/omega_v2.key', or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created 'omega_v2.key' inside the 'Keyfiles' directory.

task_completion.description: Select the correct volume to change its password and keyfiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt 'Change Volume Password' dialog or main window showing the volume path '/home/ga/Volumes/project_omega.hc' selected.

task_completion.description: Change the volume's security to use the new password and the new keyfile, while removing the old keyfile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt 'Change Password' dialog showing the new keyfile '/home/ga/Keyfiles/omega_v2.key' added, the old keyfile removed from the 'Current' section, and password fields filled. A 'Password successfully changed' or 'Volume successfully updated' confirmation dialog is also strong evidence.

task_completion.description: Mount the volume to '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1' to verify access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing '/home/ga/Volumes/project_omega.hc' successfully mounted at the directory '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1', or terminal output confirming the mount.

task_completion.description: Delete the compromised keyfile '/home/ga/Pictures/server_rack_001.jpg' from the filesystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing the execution of an 'rm' command for '/home/ga/Pictures/server_rack_001.jpg', or a GUI file manager showing the '/home/ga/Pictures/' directory with the file no longer present (or moved to Trash).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual VeraCrypt application (GUI or CLI) to perform the credential rotation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of genuine VeraCrypt windows (Keyfile Generator, Volume Properties, Change Password dialogs) or valid 'veracrypt' CLI commands in the terminal. The agent should not just be typing text into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually mounted the volume rather than just creating a fake directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt interface must show the active mount mapped to the slot, or terminal output from 'mount'/'lsblk' must confirm a VeraCrypt volume is attached to the target directory.

integrity.description: The compromised keyfile was genuinely deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'server_rack_001.jpg' should be deleted via 'rm' or moved to trash, not merely renamed to something else within the same directory to hide it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/project_omega.hc. Old keyfile: /home/ga/Pictures/server_rack_001.jpg. New keyfile: /home/ga/Keyfiles/omega_v2.key. Old password: OmegaStart2023. New password: Titanium#Shield2025. Mount point: /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1. Hidden backup key (for system use): /var/lib/veracrypt_task/backup_old.key.
